title: Filter Custom Links from Magic Wand Dashboard Selection
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Metric Wizard dashboard selection to only show Salesforce dashboards and exclude custom URL links, so that I don't accidentally select a non-Salesforce link for analysis.
description: Filters the Metric Wizard (magic wand) dashboard selection list to exclude non-Salesforce custom links that were added via the custom link feature (MBT-395). Only dashboards with Salesforce metadata should appear in the wizard since the analysis requires Salesforce API-sourced metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Metric Wizard dashboard list excludes custom URL links
Only Salesforce-sourced dashboards appear in the selection
ux_changes: Dashboard selection in the Metric Wizard filters out custom links, showing only Salesforce-sourced dashboards.
implementation_notes: Filter applied to the dashboard query used by the wizard to exclude records without Salesforce IDs.
comment_summary: Quick fix — developer filtered and pushed to staging.
